notes: Business Intelligence Family products evolved through various transitions. Cognos acquired 2007 became IBM Analytics. Intelligent Miner discontinued ~2010.
Pioneer of business intelligence / decision support systems. IBM acquired Metaphor in 1991; Intelligent Decision Server is evolution of Metaphor DIS product.
Cited in study as third-party tool (Cognos Impromptu) used with IBM BI Family for basic querying. IBM acquired Cognos for ~$5B in 2007, making Cognos the core of IBM Analytics.
IBM acquired Lotus in 1995. Lotus Approach cited as IDS end-user interface; Lotus Notes cited as IDS client.
